In September 2011, Joyce's former lover, Sean Dell McCloud, mysteriously vanished. The missing woman's family and friends would later point the blame directly at Joyce, after they said Sean Dell had recently ended an abusive relationship with her. Joyce asks for an attorney and abruptly ends the interview. She later pleaded guilty to the charges related to the 2018 death of her wife Rosalind and was sentenced to life in prison. While serving that life sentence, Joyce was additionally found guilty of malice murder and felony murder in connection to the 2011 disappearance of 35-year-old Sean Dell McCloud. Investigators said that despite an extensive search of the area where Joyce admitted to burying Sean Dell, her body was never recovered. Nevertheless, a jury found Joyce guilty of the crime, and she was sentenced to a second life term without the possibility of parole.
